summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of MoonLight v1.9 production-hardened features. All 22 API endpoints tested successfully with 100% pass rate. Verified health checks, journal operations, risk profiles, alert dispatching, AI coach backtest analysis, gzip compression, rate limiting, and regression endpoints.
passed_tests: GET /api/healthz - Health check with database latency <500ms
GET /api/journal - Journal listing with filtering by verdict, symbol, limit
GET /api/journal/stats - Statistics aggregation by status, verdict, direction
POST /api/risk/profile - Profile switching and custom profile with clamping
POST /api/alerts/test-webhook - Alert dispatching with and without overrides
POST /api/ai-coach/analyze-backtest - Backtest analysis with proper risk level detection
Response compression - gzip working for responses >1KB
Rate limiting - 100 requests/60s throttling working correctly
Regression endpoints - daily insights, live signals, data providers health
Jest unit tests - All 163 tests passing
